name: PortX Ai portfolio website maker by resume parsing
description: Developed a web application that automates personal portfolio creation by parsing resumes using AI. The system extracts key details like skills, projects, and work experience, then dynamically generates a personalized portfolio website. AI-powered resume parser to extract structured data from PDF/DOCX resumes.

name: Ai powered Expense tracker mobile app
description: Developed a cross-platform mobile application that helps users track and manage their expenses with the power of Al. The app displays detailed daily, weekly, and monthly expense breakdowns and provides smart, Al-driven suggestions to optimize spending habits and gives spending advice by analyzing spendings.

name: Film review application
description: Developed a full-stack web application for film enthusiasts to submit and view movie reviews. Users can register, log in, and share their thoughts on various films. Admins have privileges to add new movies and manage reviews.

name: invoice-and-po-comparator
description: Users can upload multiple PDF documents to view a side-by-side preview alongside a detailed breakdown highlighting specific data matches and mismatches.

name: Ecommerce-application-using-flask
description: E-Commerce Web Application | Python, Flask, HTML/CSS, JSON * Built a lightweight e-commerce application using Flask and Python, rendering dynamic frontend views with HTML/CSS and managing product data via local JSON storage

name: My website
description: A responsive personal portfolio website designed to establish a strong professional web presence. The site features a unique high-contrast, black-and-white grid UI that highlights a central profile.
